## What happened

Steps to reproduce, expected output, actual output.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Python version: `python --version`
- CLIs installed: codex / claude / copilot / gemini
- Browser: (if UI bug)

## Logs

Paste relevant stderr from `python server.py` or browser DevTools console.
